title: Subscription Monetization
html:
Subscription Monetization

Yahir's working pattern for shipping a paid app: 3-day free trial → monthly ($7.99) or yearly ($47.99 / $3.92/mo) auto-renewable subscription, fronted by a paywall that gates premium scanning + ads. Implemented for Brotein via App Store Connect + RevenueCat. Documented in 12 screenshots from August 2025 as Yahir iterated the paywall UX.

The pattern

Element Value Why
Free trial 3 days Standard App Store conversion-optimized window
Monthly $7.99 Just below psychological $10 threshold
Yearly $47.99 ($3.92/mo) ~50% effective discount vs monthly, locks in retention
Paywall gates premium scans + ad-free Free tier is functional, paid tier is frictionless
Backend RevenueCat + App Store Connect Standard iOS subscription stack

Chronology — August 2025 paywall iteration

  • 2025-08-02 — 2025 08 02 screenshot 2025 08 02 at 10 26 58 am 72798101, 2025 08 02 screenshot 2025 08 02 at 7 21 41 pm 1bf19cfb, 2025 08 02 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro max 2025 08 02 at 20 24 0 79c4bbea — first paywall screens
  • 2025-08-08 — 2025 08 08 screenshot 2025 08 07 at 10 21 50 pm dff5c4a0 — late-night iteration
  • 2025-08-09 — 2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 09 at 13 51 18 2a228a44 — simulator preview
  • 2025-08-12 — 2025 08 12 screenshot 2025 08 12 at 1 31 29 pm 2e54f3e3 — pricing tweak
  • 2025-08-16 — 2025 08 16 screenshot 2025 08 16 at 12 52 12 am 1c4c0845, 2025 08 16 screenshot 2025 08 16 at 11 40 41 am 68279135 — copy iteration
  • 2025-08-21 — 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 40 05 pm 1b34ab7e, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 40 11 pm 1f9ff66d, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 46 pm 0e81c1f8, 2025 08 21 screenshot 2025 08 21 at 1 49 55 pm 288dc231 — RevenueCat entitlements verification

Why it matters

This is the first concrete monetization pattern Yahir has shipped through to a real paywall — not a PRD, not an idea, but a working flow with an entitlement model in production. It's a primitive that transfers to Swipr (session entry fees + subscription tier), Outpace (challenge entry fees + premium), and any future stealth app. The Brotein paywall is the monetization template of the cluster.

Connections
